file_name: XACCT Technologies, Inc.SUPPORT AND MAINTENANCE AGREEMENT.txt

perturbation.original_text: Fees shall be payable within thirty (30) days of invoice which shall be exclusive of any applicable local, state, federal, use, excise, value added, GST or other taxes imposed on the fees payable for the Product Maintenance and Support Services which shall be the responsibility of Licensee.
perturbation.changed_text: Fees shall be payable within sixty (60) days of invoice which shall be exclusive of any applicable local, state, federal, use, excise, value added, GST or other taxes imposed on the fees payable for the Product Maintenance and Support Services which shall be the responsibility of Licensee.
perturbation.explanation: This change modifies the payment term from thirty (30) days to sixty (60) days. This introduces an in-text contradiction if Attachment 1, referenced in Section 2, specifies a different payment deadline or outlines penalties for payments made after 30 days. This contradiction creates uncertainty regarding the enforceable payment deadline.
perturbation.contradicted_text: XACCT may suspend or terminate Product Maintenance and Support Services if Licensee fails to timely pay Product Maintenance and Support Service fees as provided in this Agreement. XACCT may also terminate Support Services if Licensee breaches any provision of this Agreement or the License Agreement and such breach is not remedied within thirty (30) days after Licensee receives written notice of the breach. XACCT shall also have the right not to renew this Agreement with respect to any Product by providing written notice of such election at least sixty (60) days prior to the termination of Support Services for such Product, provided that XACCT no longer generally provides Support Services for such Product, or no longer provides the specific Support Services previously offered.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the payment term from thirty (30) days to sixty (60) days. The contradicted text allows XACCT to suspend or terminate services if Licensee fails to timely pay fees as provided in the Agreement and allows termination if a breach is not remedied within thirty (30) days. This directly contradicts the changed text of sixty (60) days because the Licensee could be penalized for late payment if they pay within 60 days, but after 30 days as stated in the original agreement. Therefore, there is a strong contradiction because of the changed payment terms which conflicts with the terms in the Contradicted Text.

perturbation.original_text: The Agreement will be automatically renewed for additional one (1) year terms (subject to applicable fee adjustments) unless thirty (30) days prior to the anniversary of the Effective Date Licensee gives written notice to XACCT of its intention not to renew.
perturbation.changed_text: The Agreement will be automatically renewed for additional one (1) year terms (subject to applicable fee adjustments) unless ninety (90) days prior to the anniversary of the Effective Date Licensee gives written notice to XACCT of its intention not to renew.
perturbation.explanation: Changing the notification period for non-renewal from thirty (30) days to ninety (90) days creates a direct contradiction. If Section 5.2 states XACCT has the right not to renew this Agreement with respect to any Product by providing written notice of such election at least sixty (60) days prior to the termination of Support Services for such Product; this creates an in-text contradiction of different notification periods.
perturbation.contradicted_text: XACCT may suspend or terminate Product Maintenance and Support Services if Licensee fails to timely pay Product Maintenance and Support Service fees as provided in this Agreement. XACCT may also terminate Support Services if Licensee breaches any provision of this Agreement or the License Agreement and such breach is not remedied within thirty (30) days after Licensee receives written notice of the breach. XACCT shall also have the right not to renew this Agreement with respect to any Product by providing written notice of such election at least sixty (60) days prior to the termination of Support Services for such Product, provided that XACCT no longer generally provides Support Services for such Product, or no longer provides the specific Support Services previously offered.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the notification period for non-renewal from 30 days to 90 days. The contradicted text states XACCT has the right not to renew this Agreement with respect to any Product by providing written notice of such election at least sixty (60) days prior to the termination of Support Services for such Product. This creates a direct inconsistency as Licensee is now beholden to a 90 day deadline while XACCT is held to a 60 day deadline, violating Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Direct Damages. XACCT'S SOLE LIABILITY AND LICENSEE'S EXCLUSIVE REMEDY FOR DAMAGES WITH RESPECT TO THE SUPPORT SERVICES UNDER ANY CONTRACT, TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE), STRICT LIABILITY OR OTHER THEORY, SHALL BE LIMITED TO THE AMOUNT PAID BY LICENSEE FOR THE SUPPORT SERVICES FOR THE PRIOR 12 MONTHS. XACCT'S SOLE LIABILITY AND LICENSEE'S EXCLUSIVE REMEDY FOR DAMAGES WITH RESPECT TO PRODUCT MAINTENANCE SHALL BE AS SET FORTH IN THE LICENSE AGREEMENT.
perturbation.changed_text: Direct Damages. XACCT'S SOLE LIABILITY AND LICENSEE'S EXCLUSIVE REMEDY FOR DAMAGES WITH RESPECT TO THE SUPPORT SERVICES UNDER ANY CONTRACT, TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE), STRICT LIABILITY OR OTHER THEORY, SHALL BE LIMITED TO THE AMOUNT PAID BY LICENSEE FOR THE SUPPORT SERVICES FOR THE PRIOR 6 MONTHS. XACCT'S SOLE LIABILITY AND LICENSEE'S EXCLUSIVE REMEDY FOR DAMAGES WITH RESPECT TO PRODUCT MAINTENANCE SHALL BE LIMITED TO $100.
perturbation.explanation: This change reduces the liability cap for Support Services from the prior 12 months to 6 months and sets a fixed amount of $100 for Product Maintenance. This creates an in-text contradiction with Section 4.3 if it states that `THE TERMS OF THE LICENSE AGREEMENT PERTAINING TO LIMITED WARRANTY, DISCLAIMERS OF WARRANTY AND LIMITATION OF LIABILITY SHALL APPLY TO THE MAJOR AND MINOR RELEASES OF PRODUCT DELIVERED ACCORDING TO THIS AGREEMENT` because now, one section states one thing, and the other states another.
perturbation.contradicted_text: THE TERMS OF THE LICENSE AGREEMENT PERTAINING TO LIMITED WARRANTY, DISCLAIMERS OF WARRANTY AND LIMITATION OF LIABILITY SHALL APPLY TO THE MAJOR AND MINOR RELEASES OF PRODUCT DELIVERED ACCORDING TO THIS AGREEMENT.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the liability cap for Product Maintenance to a fixed $100, directly contradicting the original agreement where `THE TERMS OF THE LICENSE AGREEMENT PERTAINING TO LIMITED WARRANTY, DISCLAIMERS OF WARRANTY AND LIMITATION OF LIABILITY SHALL APPLY TO THE MAJOR AND MINOR RELEASES OF PRODUCT DELIVERED ACCORDING TO THIS AGREEMENT.` This creates a clear inconsistency as the terms of the License agreement are no longer applicable, and now a fixed amount is imposed. This is a strong contradiction impacting enforceability and creating a legal issue.
